name: node-deep-equal
title: node-deep-equal
description:
node's assert.deepEqual algorithm
Node's assert.deepEqual() algorithm as a standalone module.
.
This module is around 5 times faster than wrapping assert.deepEqual()
in a try/catch.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-deep-equal because node's assert.deepEqual algorithm.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-deep-equal as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-deep-equal with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-deep-equal --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
